text: Send each other a voice memo saying one thing you're grateful for about them today.
Take a selfie together doing your best silly face and send it to each other.
Write down three words that describe your partner and share them.
Recreate your first date somehow today, even in a small way.
Send a compliment about something that isn't physical.
Share your favorite photo of the two of you and say why you love it.
Cook or order the meal from your first date together.
Send a throwback photo from before you met and share a fun fact about it.
Write a two-line poem about your partner, however bad, and share it.
Slow dance together for one song, even just in the kitchen.
Share one thing you're looking forward to doing together this year.
Send each other a playlist of 3 songs that remind you of your relationship.
Give each other a genuine compliment about how you've grown recently.
Plan a mini "date" for this week, even something small.
Share a memory of the two of you that always makes you smile.
Leave a sticky note or text with something you appreciate about them.
Share your "top 3" favorite moments of your relationship so far.
Draw a quick doodle of your partner and send it to them.
Tell each other one thing you've learned about love from being together.
Share a photo from today and one word that describes your mood.
Give a genuine compliment about how your partner handles hard days.
Share one small thing your partner did recently that made you feel loved.
Write down a future memory you want to make together and share it.
Send a good morning or good night message that's more detailed than usual.
Share a song that reminds you of the early days of your relationship.
Tell your partner one way they've made you a better person.
Share your favorite inside joke and why it's still funny to you.
Spend five minutes just talking with no phones nearby, then tell each other how it went.
Send a photo of something that reminded you of your partner today.
Share one thing on your bucket list you'd want to do together.
Compliment something your partner is really good at that they might not realize.
Share your idea of a perfect Sunday with your partner.
Tell your partner about a time they made you laugh until you cried.
Write a "thank you" text for something small they usually do without noticing.
Share a picture of your favorite place and why you'd want to bring your partner there.
Recall the moment you knew you liked your partner and share it.
Tell your partner something you find attractive about their personality.
Share a memory from a trip or outing you both loved.
Give your partner a genuine compliment about their sense of humor.
Share what "home" means to you in relation to your partner.
Send a photo of your favorite outfit your partner owns and why you like it.
Share one habit of your partner's that you secretly love.
Text your partner a memory from the very beginning of your relationship.
Share a compliment about how your partner treats other people.
Tell your partner a small way they've supported you recently.
Share what you're most proud of your partner for this year.
Send a voice memo singing (badly is fine) a song that reminds you of them.
Share a photo of the two of you from a year that felt important.
Tell your partner something you've never said out loud before about how you feel about them.
Share your favorite thing about lazy days together.
Compliment your partner on something they've overcome recently.
Share a "we should do this again" memory and plan to actually do it.
Tell your partner one thing that always makes you feel closer to them.
Share a photo from your phone from around a year ago.
Give your partner a compliment about how they make decisions.
Share a moment when you felt proud to introduce your partner to someone.
Tell your partner what you think your song would be if your relationship had a theme song.
Share a small gesture you want to start doing for your partner.
Compliment something about how your partner communicates.
Share a goal you have for the two of you this month.
Tell your partner one thing you'd want to relive from your relationship.
Send a message about a random memory that just popped into your head.
Share what you think your partner's love language is and why.
Compliment your partner on a recent decision they made.
Share your favorite meal you've had together and why it stands out.
Tell your partner something they do that makes hard days easier.
Share a photo of something that made you smile today.
Compliment your partner's taste in something — music, food, style, anything.
Share what you're most excited about for your future together.
Tell your partner a compliment you overheard or received about them from someone else.
Share a favorite tradition you have or want to start together.
Send your partner a voice memo just saying hi and how your day is going.
Compliment your partner on how they handle stress.
Share your favorite way to spend a rainy day together.
Tell your partner what you think makes your relationship different from others.
Share a compliment about your partner's creativity.
Send a photo of your favorite spot in your home and why it reminds you of them.
Compliment your partner on their patience.
Share a small dream you have that includes your partner.
Tell your partner about a moment you felt completely comfortable being yourself around them.
Share your favorite way your partner shows affection.
Compliment your partner's ambition or work ethic.
Share a fun fact about yourself your partner might not know yet.
Tell your partner one way you want to show up better for them.
Share your favorite way to be comforted, and ask about theirs.
Compliment your partner's kindness to strangers or others.
Share a photo that captures how you're feeling about the relationship lately.
Tell your partner what you think their best trait is.
Share a hope you have for a future trip together.
Compliment your partner's growth over the time you've known them.
Share your favorite quiet moment together recently.
Tell your partner what makes you feel most supported by them.
Share your favorite thing you've learned from your partner.
Compliment something your partner has taught you.
Share a small way you want to celebrate your relationship this week.
Tell your partner about a moment recently you felt really thankful for them.
Share your favorite way to reconnect after a busy week.
Compliment your partner's ability to make you laugh.
Share what you think "we make a good team" looks like for you two.
Tell your partner one thing you hope never changes about the two of you.
